allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('manifest.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('✓ Valid JSON'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('❌ Invalid JSON:', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('manifest.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.content_security_policy, null, 2\)\);")
